audit_items.proof_trace: When `solution.length == 0`, the else branch at line 78 executes `IERC20(assetOut).forceApprove(address(auction), s_auction.getAssetOutAmount(assetIn, amount, block.timestamp))` unconditionally before `auction.bid(...)` is called at line 81. Both calls occur in the same transaction with a fixed `block.timestamp`, so the approved amount exactly matches what the auction will pull. No alternative code path reaches line 81 without passing through lines 75–79.
